# Guarantee System README

This layer converts the vague demand "guarantee the marketing works" into an agent-operable system.

It does not pretend every product, market, offer, channel, budget, and timing condition can be forced into profitable growth. That is false. What can be made extremely strong is the system that:

1. finds existing demand instead of inventing it from nothing,
2. tests offers before scaling spend,
3. turns product truth into proof assets,
4. launches many bounded campaign variants,
5. measures signal rather than vibes,
6. records every result into Markdown memory,
7. uses failures to produce sharper next campaigns.

The correct guarantee is not "every ad makes money." The correct guarantee is:

> The agent will not stop at a failed ad. It will convert every failure into a diagnosed constraint, a new hypothesis, a better proof path, and the next campaign packet.

## New directory map

```text
guarantee_system/
  deep operating doctrine for making autonomous marketing harder to kill

guarantee_sources/
  source notes for advertising measurement, platform experiments, lift testing, agent harnesses, and claim proof

guarantee_tactics/
  tactical methods designed to maximize probability of first signal and later compounding

guarantee_skills/
  Claude/Codex-style Markdown skills for autonomous marketing execution

guarantee_templates/
  Markdown templates for campaign packets, failed-test postmortems, offer tests, and memory updates

guarantee_runbooks/
  specific runbooks for first signal, no-conversion debugging, retargeting, search intent, and scale decisions
```

## Operating law

```text
Do not ask the agent to guarantee magic.
Force the agent to guarantee output, testing, memory, adaptation, and compounding.
```

## What changed from the previous pack

The prior pack was a large Markdown-only autonomous marketing research and tactic library.

This layer adds the missing success architecture:

- guarantee taxonomy,
- probability stack,
- forced-learning loop,
- no-conversion debugger,
- demand certainty system,
- offer certainty system,
- proof certainty system,
- channel-market fit protocol,
- lift-test and incrementality playbooks,
- budget kill/scale rules,
- 30-day and 90-day autonomous execution plans,
- Claude/Codex skills for making agents execute instead of philosophize.

## Immediate agent instruction

When an agent uses this pack, it should run:

```text
Read AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md or CODEX.md, 300_GUARANTEE_SYSTEM_README.md, guarantee_system/000_index.md, guarantee_system/040_agent_prompt_master.md, and guarantee_templates/001_campaign_packet_template.md.
Then create a campaign packet for the target product.
```
